positive: A detailed symmetrical bioluminescent mandala depicting intertwining celestial flora and geometric patterns. The main subject is a central glowing moonpetal blossom surrounded by vines, stylized constellations, and geometric coral structures. The style should be a fusion of Art Nouveau and Sacred Geometry, rendered with sharp, clean silhouettes and high contrast. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, glowing gold, and emerald green. Composition must be perfectly circular and centered, designed for maximum impact on fabric. Lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, originating from the flora itself. Ultra-detailed, vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing, 8K resolution.
